name: First Person Tennis - The Real Tennis Simulator
short_description: First Person Tennis uses the most innovative physics engine to reproduce the real tennis shots in VR. Thanks to the support of a big community and professional tennis players, the game is in an endless development to reach an incredible level of realism.
detailed_description:
First Person Tennis is the first tennis simulator developed for VR.

First Person Tennis uses the most innovative physics engine to reproduce the real tennis shots in VR. Thanks to the support of a big community and professional tennis players, the game is in an endless development to reach an incredible level of realism.

First Person Tennis is for all ages and tennis players, the simulator has different levels of difficulty and options for any need.

Join First Person Tennis Discord to find friends, opponents and play online tournaments every months with big prizes.

Features:

  • Arcade and Simulation Mode.
  • Online Multiplayer.
  • Vive Tracker support: Play with your real tennis racket!
  • 4 different ways to run through the court: Teleport, Autorun, Manual Run, Run in Place.
  • One handed serve.
  • 7 different court surfaces: clay, grass, hard, blue-green hard, classic synthetic, indoor hard and indoor synthetic.
  • 13 tournaments: 4 Slam and 9 Masters.
  • Global Leaderboard.
  • Fully customizable 3D characters.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Russian, German, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Spain
*languages with full audio support
